description_for_human: Access and manage your Microsoft 365 calendar for focus time blocking and scheduling
description_for_model: Use this plugin to: (1) get free calendar slots for a given day filtered by 90+ min gaps and preferred focus windows, (2) create a focus time calendar event after user confirmation, (3) analyse weekly meeting load and detect anti-patterns like back-to-back meetings.

auth.instructions: Flows use delegated OAuth via Power Automate connections. No additional auth required from the agent.
